fwer_policy.five_null_gate: mandatory at headline; LOOCV not promoted unless 5-fold screen passes
fwer_policy.screen_promotion_rule: Δ̄ ≥ +0.025 AND seed_std < 0.020 AND frac>0 ≥ 0.95 on 5-fold OOF

A1.name: T3_yfree_abstention_score_disagreement
A1.purpose: Test whether V2-V3 ensemble prediction disagreement |p_v2 - p_v3|, Mondrian-stratified by predicted-T3 quartile bin, gives retained CCC at 70% > 0.378 (the full-cohort comparator).
A1.hypothesis: retained CCC @70% ≥ 0.46 (Δ ≥ +0.082 vs full-cohort 0.378); monotonicity violations = 0; threshold CV < 0.05.
A1.alternate_predictor_for_disagreement: iter47 with V3-GSP feature substitution at Stage-2 (k=250 univariate-corr)
A1.mondrian_bins: outer-train-only LOO quartile of predicted T3 (NOT true T3)
A1.calibration: per-bin LOO quantile of disagreement over N-1 outer-train subjects; bin-empty fallback = global quantile
A1.killable_criterion: retained CCC @70% < 0.378 OR monotonicity violations > 0 OR N5 inductive-vs-transductive gap > 0.01

A2.name: T3_yfree_abstention_score_ensembleSD
A2.purpose: Test whether ensemble prediction SD across 3 base learners (Ridge, LGB, sklearn-GB) gives retained CCC at 70% > 0.378.
A2.hypothesis: retained CCC @70% ≥ 0.46; monotonicity violations = 0; threshold CV < 0.05.
A2.score_function_yfree: std([p_ridge(x), p_lgb(x), p_gb(x)]) over 3 base learners, with each base learner trained on the SAME outer-train fold using identical hyperparameters across seeds; train artifacts fold-local.
A2.mondrian_bins: outer-train-only LOO quartile of mean prediction across the 3 learners

A3.name: T3_yfree_abstention_score_mahalanobis_train
A3.purpose: Test whether Mahalanobis distance from x_test to outer-train V2 feature distribution gives retained CCC at 70% > 0.378.
A3.hypothesis: retained CCC @70% ≥ 0.43 (gemini-bearish: range-restriction risk on severe-PD outliers); monotonicity violations = 0.
A3.score_function_yfree: Mahalanobis distance from x_test to outer-train V2 feature centroid using fold-local PCA(K=50) + diagonal-shrunk covariance; computed entirely on outer-train fold (no test).
A3.mondrian_bins: outer-train-only LOO quartile of predicted T3 (NOT distance)
A3.calibration: per-bin LOO quantile of distance over outer-train subjects
A3.killable_criterion: retained CCC @70% < 0.378 OR retained-subject T3 std < 0.5 × full-cohort T3 std (range restriction)
A3.gemini_warned_failure_mode: rejects severe-PD morphology outliers, truncates label range, CCC collapse

A4.name: T3_yfree_abstention_score_residual_meta
A4.purpose: Test whether a low-df Ridge residual meta-model (predicts |y - ŷ| from features, OOF-trained on outer-train fold only) gives retained CCC at 70% > 0.378.
A4.hypothesis: retained CCC @70% ≥ 0.42; meta-model OOF MAE on |residual| within [0.7, 1.3] × empirical std of |residual|.
A4.score_function_yfree: residual_meta(x) = Ridge(alpha=10.0).fit(inner_OOF_X_train_only, |inner_OOF_pred - y_train|).predict(x_test); meta uses only outer-train fold inner-OOF residuals.
A4.mondrian_bins: outer-train-only LOO quartile of predicted T3
A4.killable_criterion: retained CCC @70% < 0.378 OR meta-model 5-fold R^2 < 0.05 (no learnable signal in |residual|)
A4.gemini_warned_failure_mode: memorizes OOF noise at N≤92, no generalization

A5.name: T3_yfree_abstention_score_stack
A5.purpose: Stack scores A1-A4 (Ridge meta over OOF-predicted residuals from each score family) into a single retention rule, y-free.
A5.hypothesis: retained CCC @70% ≥ max(A1..A4 retained @70%) + 0.02 with same monotonicity.
A5.score_function_yfree: meta_score(x) = Ridge.fit(stack_features(A1..A4 OOF scores), inner_OOF_|residuals|).predict(stack_features_test(x)); stack uses OOF-only scores from A1..A4, meta trained inner-OOF on outer-train only.
A5.mondrian_bins: outer-train-only LOO quartile of predicted T3

B1.name: binary_PDvHC_logit_T3_proxy_audit
B1.purpose: Diagnostic (gemini's killer experiment): train heavily-regularized LogisticRegression to discriminate PD vs HC using V2 features; compute Spearman rank correlation between the continuous logit on PD subjects and their actual T3 scores. If Spearman > iter47 Spearman with T3, the ceiling is label-noise-bound and the paper pivot to ordinal/progression-proxy targets is justified.
B1.hypothesis: test_two_sided: H0 |spearman(logit, T3)| ≤ |spearman(iter47_pred, T3)|; H1 differs.
B1.fwer_excluded: this is a diagnostic, NOT a candidate — excluded from FWER family
B1.features: V2 cached_v2 1875 features, fold-local imputation + standardization
B1.split: paper3_split.json; LOOCV; PD subjects retained for evaluation only
B1.publishable_outcome: either (a) ceiling is feature-bound (Spearman fails to exceed) → paper stays on T3 regression; (b) ceiling is label-noise-bound (Spearman exceeds) → paper pivots to ordinal/proxy framing as central methodological contribution

B2.name: per_item_yfree_deployable_heatmap_repair
B2.purpose: Replace retracted Cell E heatmap. Per-item V2-V3 disagreement → per-item retention. 6 items × 4 coverages = 24 cells.
B2.hypothesis: at minimum, items {12, 10, 14} produce a monotonic retained-CCC curve under y-free retention; items {9, 11, 13} may not.
B2.score_function_yfree: per-item |p_item_v2(x) - p_item_v3gsp(x)|; per-item Mondrian bins from outer-train predicted per-item value LOO-quartile
B2.killable_criterion: any item with retained CCC @70% < full-cohort same-item CCC → flagged non-deployable, kept in heatmap as informative null

leakage_safeguards.firewall_check_required: uv run python ~/.claude/skills/pd-imu-100x-researcher/scripts/firewall_check.py <headline_script> MUST exit 0 with zero banned hits before lockbox.
leakage_safeguards.five_null_gate_required: scrambled-label, SID-shuffle, canary, library-exclusion, transductive-vs-inductive — all 5 inside the same fold loop.
leakage_safeguards.selection_leakage_banned: no eval_set/valid_sets/early_stopping_rounds against outer-test, no LOOCV-grid HPO.
leakage_safeguards.target_encoder_OOF_required: any y-dependent transform must use inner-OOF discipline.
leakage_safeguards.oracle_abstention_banned: every retention rule MUST satisfy g: X → [0,1]; substitute-y_test-with-nan test required.
leakage_safeguards.manifest_required: every reusable cache_*.csv must have <name>.manifest.json with required fields.
